'''palapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zelkovamycin|zelkovamycin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-l-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zelkovamycin|zelkovamycin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| palapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pælæpæth|pælæpæth]] || [[word:pælæpæj|pælæpæj]] || [[word:pælæpæsh|pælæpæsh]] || [[word:pælæpæ|pælæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:palalapath|palalapath]] || [[word:palalapaj|palalapaj]] || [[word:palalapash|palalapash]] || [[word:palalapa|palalapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:palapath|palapath]] || [[word:palapaj|palapaj]] || [[word:palapash|palapash]] || [[word:palapa|palapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:palafpath|palafpath]] || [[word:palafpaj|palafpaj]] || [[word:palafpash|palafpash]] || [[word:palafpaf|palafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:palapatha|palapatha]] || [[word:palapaja|palapaja]] || [[word:palapasha|palapasha]] || [[word:palapaka|palapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:palapath|palapath]] || [[word:palapaj|palapaj]] || [[word:palapash|palapash]] || [[word:palapa|palapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:palapathal|palapathal]] || [[word:palapajal|palapajal]] || [[word:palapashal|palapashal]] || [[word:palapakal|palapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:palapathatha|palapathatha]] || [[word:palapajaja|palapajaja]] || [[word:palapashasha|palapashasha]] || [[word:palapaka|palapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:palapathan|palapathan]] || [[word:palapajan|palapajan]] || [[word:palapashan|palapashan]] || [[word:palapakan|palapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:palapathaoro|palapathaoro]] || [[word:palapajaoro|palapajaoro]] || [[word:palapashaoro|palapashaoro]] || [[word:palapakaoro|palapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
